utility_evaluation.REASONING:
The required format lists 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, and total_budget. The final package includes all 7 items. Each item is fully specified: 
- destination: 'Prague, Czech Republic' (complete)
- travel_dates: '2024-10-10 to 2024-10-15' (complete)
- transportation: detailed flight information including costs and extra details (complete)
- accommodation: hotel name, type, location, nights, price, total cost, and amenities (complete)
- activities: description, type, duration, cost, and extras (complete)
- additional_services: specified as none (explicitly addressed, complete)
- total_budget: cost breakdown, currency, budget limit, remaining (complete)
Thus, all 7 out of 7 items are covered with full details.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final package includes the destination 'Prague, Czech Republic', which has a rating of 7 in the ground-truth. The transportation is a 'Budget Airline' in 'Economy Class', which corresponds to the 'budget_airlines' -> 'Economy Class' entry rated 10. The accommodation is 'Tranquil Inn', which has a rating of 7. The activity listed is 'Personalized Wellness Alignment' described as a 'Walking tour' and 'Wellness experience'; there is no exact match with that name, but the closest corresponding activities are 'City Walking Tour' (rating 9) and 'Yoga Retreat' (rating 10), since they fit the walking and wellness aspects respectively. There are no additional services included, so we do not map any for that category.
